title: FireWalker
description: Create Bridges across lava with this new enchantment!
body:
This mod creates a new enchantment called Fire Walker. This lets you walk across lava buy creating solid magma beneath your feet, allowing you to easilly traverse the nether lava lakes. This solid magma will slowly decay and turn back into lava, and acts similar to the vanilla enchantment Frost Walker. It does not create magma if you are swimming in lava, or fall into it.

 

This enchantment is for boots only and is incompatable with both the Frost Walker and the Depth Strider Enchantments.

It has 2 levels of enchantment, which vary the size of the magma 'bridges' you form when moving.

 

It is currently available for Forge 1.15, 1.16.3, 1.20.2, and Fabric 1.20.2 with other versions potentially coming at a later date.
